creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch works well at fixing files being fetched late, but it does not
address them being fetched early.

See for example the latest irc/gseen.mod. Comment out the BUILD_DEPENDS
in the port first. Then remote
/usr/ports/distfiles/eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2, then run 'make
extract-depends'. Here it will try fetching the distfile, which it
should not do until 'fetch'

I think this needs to be addressed as well to make the patch here
complete at forcing all distfiles to be fetched in 'fetch'.

make extract-depends (in no-network jail):
> ===>   Returning to build of gseen.mod-1.1.1.p3_4
> ===>   gseen.mod-1.1.1.p3_4 depends on file: /nonexistent - not found
> ===>    Verifying extract for /nonexistent in /usr/ports/irc/eggdrop
> ===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
> ===>   eggdrop-1.6.21_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
> => eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
> => Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.eggheads.org/pub/eggdrop/source/1.6/eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2
> fetch: ftp://ftp.eggheads.org/pub/eggdrop/source/1.6/eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2: Can't assign requested address
> => Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2
> fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/eggdrop1.6.21.tar.bz2: Can't assign requested address
> => Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
> => port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/irc/eggdrop.
> *** Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/irc/gseen.mod.


Bryan
